examples: Ingredients: Lactic Acid, Salvia Offcinalis Saga, Limonene.
Major ingredients: Salvia Officinalis, Lactic Acid, Limonene, Glyeoilic Acid.
You will obtain infrared spectra of the carvone and limonene fractions and interpret the results.
Orange peels are particularly good for this technique because they are rich in a key chemical, d-limonene, which is also an ingredient in many cleaning products and cosmetics.
